summary: Tested pre-job admission controller and strict per-user concurrency limits. Backend tests all pass (12/12). Frontend 429 handling code reviewed and confirmed correct. Backend correctly returns HTTP 429 with admission_rejected error when user exceeds concurrency limit.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admission controller and concurrency limits fully tested. Note: test@visionary-suite.com is in RATE_LIMIT_EXEMPT_EMAILS but NOT exempt from admission controller concurrency limits. Free plan max=1, Admin max=10. 429 rejection returns {error: 'admission_rejected', message: '<clear user message>', retry_after_sec: 60}

public_endpoints_regression.stats: PASS - Returns platform metrics (creators, videos_created, total_creations)

admission_free_user_first_job.detail: Free user can create job when active_jobs=0

response_format.detail.message: You already have an active video being generated. Free accounts can run 1 job at a time. Please wait for it to finish or upgrade your plan.

behavior: Sets formError to display admission message in form

admission_controller.concurrency_check: User's active (QUEUED + PROCESSING) jobs counted against plan limit
admission_controller.free_user_rejection: Clear message about 1 job limit with upgrade suggestion
admission_controller.paid_user_rejection: Message about waiting for jobs to finish
admission_controller.system_overload_handling: Free users rejected, paid users queued with ETA, premium admitted

rate_limit_exempt_users.note: Exempt from rate limiting (videos/hour) but NOT exempt from admission controller concurrency limits
